ddls:
CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "group_name" TEXT /* The group to which the user belongs */,
  "email" TEXT /* User's email address */,
  "phone" TEXT /* User's phone number */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the user account */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Role ID of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES roles ("role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_group_name FOREIGN KEY ("group_name") REFERENCES groups ("group_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "purchases" (
  "purchase_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each purchase record */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* User ID of the purchaser */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date when the purchase was made */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Product ID of the purchased item */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the product purchased */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location where the purchase was made */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Payment method used for the purchase */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of the purchase */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the purchase record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the purchase record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("purchase_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_purchases_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "groups" (
  "group_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each group */,
  "group_name" TEXT /* Name of the user group */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the purpose of the group */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the group was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the group */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("group_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "purchase_summary" (
  "summary_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each summary record */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* User ID related to the summary */,
  "total_purchases" INTEGER /* Total number of purchases made by the user */,
  "total_spent" REAL /* Total amount of money spent by the user */,
  "last_purchase_date" TEXT /* Date of the user's last purchase */,
  "average_purchase_amount" REAL /* Average amount spent per purchase */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the summary record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the summary record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("summary_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_purchase_summary_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role (e.g., admin, user) */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions associated with the role */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the role was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)
